items.title: XREAL 确认 Project Aura 智能眼镜年内出货，搭载安卓 XR 与 Gemini AI
items.summary: IT之家 5 月 20 日消息，科技媒体 Android Headline 昨日（5 月 19 日）发布博文，报道称在 2026 年谷歌 I/O 开发者大会上，XREAL 展示基于安卓 XR 的  Project Aura 眼镜，官方确认将于 2026 年年底前出货。Xreal Project Aura 智能眼镜这款产品的核心看点有三个：基于安卓 XR、采用外接计算模块设计、整机重量据称低于 90g。IT之家援引博文介绍，对普通用户来说，它更像一副偏娱乐用途的 AR 眼镜，适合看 YouTube、HBO Max 等视频内容。重量方面，Project Aura 重量低于 90 克。作为参照，Meta Ray-Ban Displays 重 69 克，XREAL 1S 约 82 克，One Pro 约 87 克。设计方面，Project Aura 采用分离式设计，把更多内部组件放进一个可夹在口袋上的外接模块。这个外接模块不只是“电池盒”，还兼作实体触控板，用来配合原生手势控制。眼镜框上有 3 个朝外摄像头，用于识别用户手势。XREAL 认为，在现阶段硬件条件下，想同时兼顾轻量机身、

items.title: Gracia's Moving Volumetric Captures Are Now Streamable, A World-First
items.summary: Gracia's moving fully volumetric captures can now be streamed, including to mixed reality on Quest 3, with no app or content download required — and an Apple Vision Pro app is coming soon.

items.title: First AR Glasses Running Android XR Confirmed for 2026 Launch
items.summary:
XREAL today confirmed it’s launching Project Aura sometime this year, making them the first pair of AR glasses running Google’s Android XR operating system. Xreal and Google showcased Project Aura at Google I/O today, further confirming the wired AR glasses are set to launch globally in 2026. On stage, Project Aura was shown off running […]
The post First AR Glasses Running Android XR Confirmed for 2026 Launch appeared first on Road to VR.

items.title: Google Announces New Android XR Developer Program with AR Glasses Dev Kits
items.summary:
Google today announced at its I/O developer conference that it’s launching a new Android XR developer program, which will include XREAL’s upcoming AR glasses. Called the ‘Android XR Developer Catalyst Program’, Google and AR hardware partner Xreal say they’ll be seeding program applicants with Project Aura dev kits, as well as tools and additional resources […]
